name: Morphisms & Rational Maps
description: Regular morphisms φ*:O_Y→φ*O_X. Rational map = equivalence on dense open. Birational ⇔ dominant + iso on function fields. Blow-up.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Regular map\nφ*: O_Y→φ*O_X"]
    D2["Def: Rational map\nequiv on dense open"]
    D3["Def: Dominant\nφX̄ = Y"]
    D4["Def: Birational\nkX ≅ kY"]
    T1["Thm: Closed immersion\nI ↦ Spec R/I"]
    T2["Thm: Birational ⇔\ndominant + iso fns"]
    T3["Thm: Blow-up\nBℓ_p X → X"]
    T4["Thm: Resolution\nbirat surf → smooth"]
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> D4
    D4 --> T2
    D2 --> T3
    T3 --> T4
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4 theorem
